overall.description: A first-person walk along a wet highway shoulder on the outskirts of a futuristic city, passing a large 'DeKota' billboard and traffic barriers. Vehicles periodically pass by on the multi-lane road. The scene is rendered in a video game engine with a desaturated, overcast aesthetic typical of Cyberpunk 2077's Badlands area.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway shoulder with large billboard approaching city

events.description: white sports car passes by on the right side of the highway
dark SUV passes by on the right side of the highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the highway shoulder toward the DeKota billboard and distant city skyline

notable_agents.action: white sports car driving past at high speed on the wet highway
dark SUV driving past on the highway

entered.detail: Large vertical billboard structure with 'DeKota' signage in blue and yellow
Industrial buildings, towers, and construction equipment on the left side
Futuristic city skyline with tall skyscrapers visible in the distance ahead
Wet asphalt multi-lane highway with visible lane markings
Sparse grass and desert shrubs along the highway shoulder

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a desaturated, overcast day with a view of a large 'DeKota' billboard ahead. The camera walks forward along the highway shoulder, passing sparse vegetation while vehicles periodically drive past on the wet asphalt to the right. Industrial structures line the left side while the futuristic Night City skyline looms in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway shoulder with concrete barriers and tires

events.description: passing the DeKota billboard structure, moving beyond the sign
sedan passes by on the highway to the right

agents.ego_description: continuing along the shoulder, now walking alongside concrete barriers and stacked tires

notable_agents.action: sedan driving past on the highway

entered.detail: Red and white striped concrete barriers lining the shoulder
Piles of black rubber tires stacked beside the concrete barriers

segments.scene_description: Having passed the DeKota billboard, the camera now walks alongside red-and-white concrete barriers with stacked tires on the left. The space feels more enclosed between the barriers and the highway. Vehicles continue to pass on the right while the industrial district structures draw closer on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway shoulder with metal guardrails approaching city center

events.description: concrete barriers end and transition to metal guardrails along the shoulder
sequence of vehicles pass by including a dark sedan and SUV

agents.ego_description: walking along the guardrail section with the city skyline growing larger ahead

entered.detail: Silver metal highway guardrails replacing the concrete barriers

segments.scene_description: The final segment features a long walk alongside metal guardrails as the concrete barriers and tires fall behind. The city skyline ahead grows progressively larger and more detailed. The road continues straight toward the urban center with occasional vehicles passing by, maintaining the desaturated, overcast atmosphere throughout the approach.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a desolate highway shoulder that gradually transitions from an open industrial periphery toward the looming urban center of a futuristic city. It begins under a desaturated, overcast sky, passing a large DeKota billboard and sparse vegetation while vehicles glide past on the wet asphalt. As the camera moves forward, the environment becomes more enclosed, shifting from the open roadside to a narrow path flanked by red-and-white concrete barriers and stacked tires. The scene then opens up again as the concrete barriers give way to long metal guardrails, allowing the distant city skyline to grow progressively larger and more detailed. Finally, the camera continues its straight trajectory toward the urban heart, maintaining the bleak, muted atmosphere as the industrial outskirts fade behind.
